arts.ttl: Porto reportedly eying Barcelona youngster to replace Nico González
arts.sum: Heads were turned earlier today as Manchester City agreed a €60 million move with Porto for former Barcelona youngster Nico González. As per Fabrizio Romano, Porto are now eying another…

arts.ttl: Torino Close to Securing Amine Salama from Reims
arts.sum: On the final day of the transfer window, Torino are on the verge of fulfilling Paolo Vanoli's request by bringing in Amine Salama, a 24-year-old striker from Reims. The Granata, following Duvan Zapata's injury in October, had initially pursued Beto from Everton and Marko Arnautovic, but are now nearing an agreement for the French forward. The post Torino Close to Securing Amine Salama from Reims appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Man City 'set to sign Porto midfielder Nico Gonzalez in £50m deal as struggling champions continue big January spending'
arts.sum: Manchester City are close to finalising an agreement to sign midfielder Nico Gonzalez from Porto, according to reports.

arts.ttl: Who is Nico González? – The former Barcelona youngster swapping Porto for Man City
arts.sum: Arguably the biggest movement involving a Spanish club on deadline day doesn’t even involve a La Liga club selling or buying someone. Barcelona are set to receive €24 million for…

arts.ttl: Manchester City expect to sign Porto’s Nico González for about £50m
arts.sum: Midfielder wanted after Rodri’s season-ending injury City have spent £122.5m on three players in this window Manchester City expect to seal a deal to sign Porto’s Nico González, with the fee set to be the midfielder’s release clause of about £50m. City are thought to have been reluctant to pay the clause but are poised to do so to add the former Barcelona player to their squad. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Nicolas Gonzalez: Man City set to complete fourth January transfer after striking 'agreement' for £48.9m deal
arts.sum: Man City’s squad overhaul is poised to continue with the arrival of the talented midfielder

arts.ttl: Man City signing confirmed as Guardiola sends Barcelona €24m
arts.sum: Manchester City’s big-spending January continues, with Fabrizio Romano announcing that the club have effectively completed a fourth major signing of the transfer window. The defending Premier League champions have secured the signing of Porto midfielder Nico Gonzalez for a fee of €60 million, with the Etihad club pressed into matching the release clause of the former Barcelona youngster.

arts.ttl: FC Porto make contact to sign West Ham player in deadline day deal
arts.sum: FC Porto have made contact with West Ham United regarding a deal for Luís Guilherme, with the Brazilian seriously struggling for minutes with the Hammers. The 18-year-old has had just 50 minutes of senior action this season and his camp will probably believe he needs more than that to aid his development. arts.ttl: Man City Deadline Day Rumours: Champions to bolster midfield with FC Porto star?
arts.sum: Manchester City were pulverised at the Emirates Stadium on Sunday. Despite pulling level shortly after the restart, City capitulated to fall to a 5-1 loss at Arsenal. City are now 15 points off first-...

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Man City lowball Porto in Nico Gonzalez pursuit
arts.sum: Manchester City are hoping to finalise a Deadline Day deal for Nico Gonzalez, but FootballTransfers understands they are yet to reach an agreement with Porto . Barcelona crucially included a 40% sell-on clause when they offloaded Gonzalez to Porto and Martin Anselmi’s side are therefore eager to maximise the Spaniard’s transfer fee.
